tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]

Meet Dr. Price

Dr. June Price is a Greer native and has been practicing dentistry in the Upstate since 2009. She believes that dentistry should be a positive experience and is proud to be a part of the team at Poinsett Dental Associates.

Dr. Price received her Bachelor of Science in biological sciences from Clemson University’s Calhoun Honors College and then went on to earn her Doctor of Dental Medicine degree from the Medical University of South Carolina. While at MUSC, she was awarded multiple accolades and scholarships, including the John Meador Snead Scholarship, the recipient of which demonstrates true compassion for others and a talent for dentistry.

She gives back to her hometown community by volunteering at the free dental clinic and participating in Dental Access Days.

Dr. Price and her husband met while in dental school, and they have a daughter and son together. When she’s not busy working as a Greer dentist, Dr. Price enjoys spending time with her family, cooking, exercising and being outdoors.
